parameters.content:
## GoToWebinar List probe (2026)

Fetches all GoToWebinar webinars starting in 2026, flattened to the fields we need to match against Salesforce webinar campaigns (key, subject, start date/time, timezone).

AFTER IMPORT:
1. Select your 'GoToWebinar OAuth2 API' credential on 'Get Webinars'.
2. Hit 'Execute workflow'.
3. Open the 'Flatten' node output and copy the JSON — that's the data to share.

No DB writes, no registrants/attendees calls — just the webinar list + start dates so we can confirm the SF<->GTW date match. (Attendance counts come later in the real ingest.)

Match plan: GTW start-date == SF Campaign.StartDate (Aarav confirmed they're equal); region token disambiguates same-day UK/IE / BeLux / NL variants.

nodes.name: Get Webinars
nodes.notes: Select your predefined GoToWebinar OAuth2 API credential.
